activeStudies.title: Pediatric Anesthesia Induction: Non-Pharmacological Distraction Techniques
activeStudies.investigator: Dr. Sarah Jenkins & Research Group A
activeStudies.description: Evaluating the efficacy of immersive VR gaming and interactive projection screens in reducing pre-operative anxiety during mask induction in children aged 4-10.

activeStudies.title: Post-operative Cognitive Dysfunction in Geriatric Patients: Biomarker Analysis
activeStudies.description: A multicenter prospective study identifying serum S100B and inflammatory cytokines to predict early cognitive declines after orthopedic surgeries under general anesthesia.

activeStudies.title: AI-Driven Patient Monitoring during Deep Sedation in Non-Operating Room Settings
activeStudies.description: Validating neural network models trained on plethysmograph waveform dynamics to predict respiratory depression 60 seconds prior to clinical onset.

activeStudies.title: Ultra-Low-Dose Dexmedetomidine for Post-Anesthetic Shivering in Recovery
activeStudies.description: Double-blind randomized controlled trial testing sub-clinical infusions of dexmedetomidine versus placebo for rapid relief of shivering in PACU.

publications.title: Epidural Volume Expansion in Obstetric Patients: A Systematic Review of Combined Spinal-Epidural Techniques
publications.authors: L. Chen, M. Gable, S. Jenkins

publications.title: Student-Led Collaborative Research Networks in Anesthesiology: Barriers and Facilitators to Global Integration
publications.authors: SACRA Network Researchers, E. Rostova, H. Patel

publications.title: Optimal Airway Management in Remote Rural Clinics: A Simulation-Based Student Trial
publications.authors: M. Vance, J. Thompson, A. Al-Mansoor

publications.title: Perioperative Hypothermia Prevention: A Cross-Sectional Quality Improvement Audit in Academic Hospitals
publications.authors: A. Carter, L. Chen, O. Peterson
